attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_BKGS_MEASURE_ICPM  GL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_REV_DISTI_SL3_SL2_MAP MAPPING
ON L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE =MAPPING.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD
 GROUP BY 
 DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  
 ,L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
 ,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

SELECT
Q1.PRODUCT_KEY                 
,Q1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY        
,Q2.POS_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   
,Q1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,3 TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT  DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT       DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT   DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY    DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_CREDIT_MEMO_AMT    DV_CREDIT_MEMO_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_DEBIT_MEMO_AMT    DV_DEBIT_MEMO_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_INV_REV_BASE_LIST_AMT    DV_INV_REV_BASE_LIST_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_SHIPPED_REV_AMT    DV_SHIPPED_REV_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_NET_ADJ_AMT    DV_NET_ADJ_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT    DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_DIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT    DV_DIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_DIRECT_COST_ADJ_AMT    DV_DIRECT_COST_ADJ_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_INDIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT    DV_INDIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_INDIRECT_COGS_ADJ_AMT    DV_INDIRECT_COGS_ADJ_AMT
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_GMB_COGS_ADJ_AMT    DV_GMB_COGS_ADJ_AMT  
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_EXCESS_OBSOLETE_ADJ_AMT    DV_EXCESS_OBSOLETE_ADJ_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_OVERHEAD_ADJ_AMT    DV_OVERHEAD_ADJ_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_VARIANCE_ADJ_AMT    DV_VARIANCE_ADJ_AMT 
,Q2.POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO*Q1.DV_WARRANTY_ADJ_AMT    DV_WARRANTY_ADJ_AMT 
	FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_WWDISTI   Q1
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_REV_DISTI_SL3_SL2_MAP MAPPING
ON (  Q1.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE =MAPPING.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD)
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BKGS_MSR_ICPM_POS_ALC_UNK Q2
ON(MAPPING.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD =Q2.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND MAPPING.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD =Q2.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
)
WHERE  Q1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE<>'UNK' 
AND
NOT EXISTS
(SEL 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_REV_DISTI_SL3_SL2_MAP MAPPING,$$STGDB.WI_ICPM_POS_SL2_COUNTRY C
WHERE MAPPING.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD=C.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND C.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = Q1.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
AND Q1.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=MAPPING.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD
)
